name: wm_status
_note: worldmodel.wm_status is served by the LENS_ACTIONS registry (server/domains/worldmodel.js via registerLensAction), NOT the server.js MACROS register() blocks — and /api/lens/run PREFERS LENS_ACTIONS, so this is the registry the lens UI actually reaches. The lens-driven worldmodel.* names (wm_status, graph, run_scenario, ingest, capture_snapshot, …) are DISJOINT from the server.js MACROS worldmodel names (status, simulate, create_entity, …); there is no shadowing. Because runMacro (the assassin's driver) only walks MACROS, this handler is exercised by server/tests/worldmodel-lens-macros.test.js (the LENS_ACTIONS 3-arg dispatch), not by the assassin. The handler returns the { ok, result } envelope and degrades to all-zero counts on empty STATE — never no_db, never a throw. Read-only — no writes.
